Text.Page:
Greetings, .

It seems that the mad Bandersnatch has abducted one of the Mysterium's greatest minds. Maester Adonis has offered a reward for the safe return of his advisor, Aliss, and the death of Bandersnatch.

Thank you for defeating Bandersnatch.

Here is the reward Maester Adonis promised.

Your service will be forever remembered in the annals of the Mysterium.
